positive: A stylized, symmetrical depiction of a mystical celestial forest scene. In the center, a towering, bioluminescent cosmic tree stands, its branches forming geometric patterns and emitting soft neon blues and vibrant purples. Surrounding the base of the tree are stylized, geometric flora and fauna, including stylized glowing mushrooms, gentle crystalline deer silhouettes, and abstract constellation patterns embedded in the foliage. The overall aesthetic is retro-futuristic mystic art, resembling Art Deco mixed with vaporwave aesthetics. The composition must feature strong, clean silhouettes against a gradient background of deep indigo and ethereal teal. High contrast is essential, using limited, luminous color palettes (electric blue, magenta, lime green) for maximal print pop. Flat, vector-art quality, perfect for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, low resolution, text, signature, watermark, writing, excessive detail, photo-realistic, gradient bleed, low contrast, fuzzy, abstract mess, asymmetrical
